passiveAbilities.name: Claw and Hook
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Barnacle Encrusted Shell
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -1.

activeAbilities.name: "Look out!"
activeAbilities.description: Target friendly character’s Evade stat is reduced by -1 until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Pinch
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target loses possession of one Moonstone they are carrying and this model gains possession of that Moonstone.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Punch
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers 2 Impact Dmg. If this character has already used the Pinch ability this turn, increase this Dmg by +1.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: First of the Month!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character has already used the Pinch and Punch abilities this turn then the enemy suffers 2 Wds and cannot take a Melee Attack action targeting this model until end of turn.
